question: How many books are in the library?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_books FROM books;

question: What are the distinct genres available in the library?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT DISTINCT genre FROM books ORDER BY genre;

question: List all unpaid fines.
ground_truth_sql: SELECT * FROM fines WHERE paid = FALSE;

question: Show members with their currently active loans and the book title.
ground_truth_sql: SELECT m.name, b.title, l.loan_date FROM loans l JOIN members m ON l.member_id = m.member_id JOIN books b ON l.book_id = b.book_id WHERE l.status = 'active';

question: What is the total fine amount owed by each member?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT m.name, SUM(f.amount) AS total_fines FROM fines f JOIN loans l ON f.loan_id = l.loan_id JOIN members m ON l.member_id = m.member_id GROUP BY m.member_id, m.name ORDER BY total_fines DESC;

question: Which books have been borrowed the most times?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT b.title, b.author, COUNT(l.loan_id) AS borrow_count FROM books b JOIN loans l ON b.book_id = l.book_id GROUP BY b.book_id, b.title, b.author ORDER BY borrow_count DESC LIMIT 5;

question: Show all overdue loans with the member name and book title.
ground_truth_sql: SELECT m.name, b.title, l.loan_date, l.return_date FROM loans l JOIN members m ON l.member_id = m.member_id JOIN books b ON l.book_id = b.book_id WHERE l.status = 'overdue';

question: Show a summary of paid versus unpaid fines with the count and total amount for each.
ground_truth_sql: SELECT paid, COUNT(*) AS fine_count, SUM(amount) AS total_amount FROM fines GROUP BY paid;

question: Which members have never borrowed a book?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT name, email, membership_type FROM members WHERE member_id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT member_id FROM loans);

question: Which genre has been borrowed the most times overall?
ground_truth_sql: WITH genre_counts AS (SELECT b.genre, COUNT(l.loan_id) AS borrow_count FROM books b JOIN loans l ON b.book_id = l.book_id GROUP BY b.genre) SELECT genre, borrow_count FROM genre_counts ORDER BY borrow_count DESC LIMIT 1;

question: Which members have total fines exceeding $10?
ground_truth_sql: WITH member_fines AS (SELECT m.member_id, m.name, SUM(f.amount) AS total_fines FROM fines f JOIN loans l ON f.loan_id = l.loan_id JOIN members m ON l.member_id = m.member_id GROUP BY m.member_id, m.name) SELECT name, total_fines FROM member_fines WHERE total_fines > 10 ORDER BY total_fines DESC;

question: What is the average loan duration in days by membership type, for loans that have been returned?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT m.membership_type, ROUND(AVG(l.return_date - l.loan_date), 1) AS avg_loan_days FROM loans l JOIN members m ON l.member_id = m.member_id WHERE l.status = 'returned' AND l.return_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY m.membership_type;

question: Which books have been borrowed more than once?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT b.title, b.author, COUNT(l.loan_id) AS times_borrowed FROM books b JOIN loans l ON b.book_id = l.book_id GROUP BY b.book_id, b.title, b.author HAVING COUNT(l.loan_id) > 1 ORDER BY times_borrowed DESC;
